$comment: Committed project config for the parker-brain factory. Onboarding runs inside a factory clone: the brand repo gets cloned as a sibling/subfolder, so the brand bundle's own settings.json does not govern the session yet. These allow rules pre-approve the credential-file writes the onboarding clone flow depends on (the clone-time temp file and any brand repo's .git/parker-credentials), so the safety classifier is never asked about the one sanctioned place a token may be written. The flow itself: templates/brand-routines/claude/skills/save-brain/SKILL.md; rationale: system/brain-git-sync.md.
